name: My City Builders, Inc.
summary: PART I Business Overview In July 2022, we acquired RAC Real Estate Acquisition Corp. (RAC), a Wyoming-based corporation, which was a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company. Through RAC, the Company focuses on real estate transactions, particularly the acquisition, development, and sale or rental of low-income housing. Our investment approach is segmented into three primary areas: Acquiring, refurbishing, and selling traditional foreclosures; Purchasing, developing, and renting properties in "Lan...
